markdown:
#  View Project Submittal Insights 
#####  Limited Release
**New Procore customers** can view targeted project level insights within Procore's new Project Overview experience beginning June 3, 2024. To learn more about the Project Overview experience, see [About Project Overview](https://support.procore.com/products/online/user-guide/project-level/project-overview/tutorials/about-the-project-overview).
**Existing Procore customers** will have access to the new Project Overview Insights experience within the next few months.
##  Background 
Company and Project administrators can view average Submittal response time insights from Project Overview to help solve issues related to underutilized data in their construction projects.
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions** :
    * 'Admin' level permissions from the Company’s Admin settings to see insights on Project Overview.
    * 'Admin' level permissions from the Project’s Admin settings to see insights on Project Overview.


##  Steps 
  1. Click **Project Tools** and select **Home** to navigate to the **Project Overview**.
  2. Click the **name of the project**.
  3. The **Average Submittal Response Time** insights card displays on the side panel.  
_Note_ : Your insights will vary based on the number of Submittals you have.  
![Submittal Response Time Insights](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/67f5c455e194423e851addf23aa66cd2/fb1f9d701f050cfc2daa4f801d593bc5/Submittal-Response-Time-Insights.png?fm=webp)
     * **Average Response Time by Project** _-_ Current project's average Submittal response time.
     * **Average Response Time by Company** - Company's average Submittal response time based on past projects.
     * **Average Response Time by Industry** - Average industry response time on Submittals based on current project type and size.
  4. Click the **vertical ellipsis** ![Icon Ellipsis Vertical](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/b6d0fa56ca6a66941a4032499f56aec8/2bb6315cb1db00c907bda1e2ae7a081c/icon-vertical-ellipsis.png?fm=webp&h=15) to do the following:
     * **Share** - Download the insight as a PDF.
     * **Support Center** - View Procore's product support area.
     * **Provide Feedback** - Provide feedback about your experience.
  5. Click **Go to Report** to view a prebuilt report template for more detail about the RFIs included in the calculations for the project.
  6. Click **View all Submittals** to go to the Submittals tool.


## See Also
  * [project details](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/insights/tutorials/project-details)
  * [company details](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/insights/tutorials/company-details)
  * [Adoption Report](https://v2.support.procore.com/reference-adoption-report)
title: View Project Submittal Insights
description: How to view Submittal insights on Project Overview.
